query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: A field of small, luminous colored squares arranged in loose horizontal rows against a solid black background. The squares appear in various hues including red, blue, green, purple, magenta, yellow, and cyan. A large, amorphous black region in the lower center interrupts the grid, surrounded by the colored squares which vary slightly in size, spacing, and alignment.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A field of small, luminous colored squares arranged in loose horizontal rows against a solid black background. The squares appear in various hues including red, blue, green, purple, magenta, yellow, and cyan. A large, amorphous black region in the lower center interrupts the grid, surrounded by the colored squares which vary slightly in size, spacing, and alignment. The image functions as abstract photography, prioritizing formal qualities of color, geometry, and negative space over any recognizable representational subject.
